allow: Bash(.venv/bin/python -c "import config; print\(''MAX_POSITIONS:'', config.MAX_POSITIONS\); print\(''POSITION_PCT:'', config.POSITION_PCT\); print\(''CASH_RESERVE_PCT:'', config.CASH_RESERVE_PCT\); print\(''STOP_LOSS_PCT:'', config.STOP_LOSS_PCT\); print\(''DENY_INDUSTRIES:'', config.DENY_INDUSTRIES\)")
Bash(.venv/bin/python -c "import config; print\('DENY_INDUSTRIES:', config.DENY_INDUSTRIES, type\(config.DENY_INDUSTRIES\)\); print\('all OK'\)")
